annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under MCL §600.6013 (Michigan interest runs from the filing of the complaint), COMPOUNDED ANNUALLY: the general rate is 1% above the six-month average of 5-year Treasury auctions, reset each Jan 1 / Jul 1 — currently 4.959% (period beginning July 1, 2026 = 1% + 3.959%). Judgments on a written instrument use a separate rate (the instrument's rate, capped at 13%, also compounded). Verify the current period at legislature.mi.gov. Not legal advice.
